def negative_exception_raised_and_caught_for_control_flow_within_same_function():
    rule_id = "exception_raised_and_caught_for_control_flow_within_same_function"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Exception raised and immediately caught within the same function as an alternative to a conditional return."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
